name: Pending question is deferred on 24 hour timeout
description: When a user leaves a check-in question unanswered for more than 24 hours, the scheduler defers the pending question to the next check-in instead of marking it as no_answer. The next check-in then asks the deferred question at the start of the session.

expectations.description: Answering the first question leads to a pending reliever_use question
Next check-in starts by re-raising the question that timed out
Deferred question is the reliever_use question that was left unanswered
After answering all questions including the deferred ones the session ends
